bridge_functions.name: Push.PollNow
bridge_functions.description: Schedule one immediate poll instead of waiting for the 15 minute cycle: connect to the group relay, answer its NIP-42 challenge (Amber, bunker or local key) and pull chat events. Diagnostics only; result goes to logcat, tag PushPoll.

bridge_functions.name: Push.Sync
bridge_functions.description: Store the client state (pubkey, relay, rooms, session) in SharedPreferences and enqueue periodic (15 min, WorkManager minimum) background polling. Empty state or no rooms cancels the polling.

bridge_functions.name: Push.RequestNotificationPermission
bridge_functions.description: Show the Android 13+ POST_NOTIFICATIONS runtime permission dialog. Async — poll Push.NotificationPermissionStatus for the outcome.
